content.query:
CREATE VIEW		v_AutoCommissions
-- drop view v_AutoCommissions
as
SELECT          A.[Customer Number], A.[Customer Name], A.[Order Number], A.[PO Number]
,               A.[Line Number], A.Brand, A.[Item Number], A.[Item Description]
,               A.[Invoice Number], [Invoice Date], Year, Month, [Invoice Amt], [Commission Amt]
,               [Sales Rep ID], [Sales Rep Name], [Trade Agreement Number], [Trade Agreement Description]
,               [Trade Agreement Name]
,               COALESCE(TOWN2, C.TOWN, A.City) as ShipToCity
,               COALESCE(ECAR2, C.ECAR, A.State) as ShipToState
,               COALESCE(PONO2, C.PONO, A.[Zip Code]) as ShipToZip
FROM
(
SELECT			distinct OBT.CUNO AS [Customer Number]
,				OC.CUNM AS [Customer Name]
,				OBT.ORNO AS [Order Number]
,               OH.CUOR AS [PO Number]
,				OBT.PONR AS [Line Number]
,				MI.ITCL AS [Brand]
,				OBT.ITNO AS [Item Number]
,				MI.ITDS AS [Item Description]
,				OBT.EXIN AS [Invoice Number]
,				CAST(NULLIF(CAST(IVDT AS VARCHAR(MAX)),0) AS DATE) AS [Invoice Date]
,				OBT.YEA4 AS [Year]
,				OBT.PERI AS [Month]
,				OBT.ABOV AS [Invoice Amt]
,				OBT.ALBO AS [Commission Amt]
,				OBT.TREC AS [Sales Rep ID]
,				CS.TX40 AS [Sales Rep Name]
,				OBT.TAGN AS [Trade Agreement Number]
,           	OBT2.TX40 AS [Trade Agreement Description]
,           	OBT2.TX15 AS [Trade Agreement Name]
,               OH.ADID AS [Address ID]
,               OC.CUA1 as [Address 1]
,               OC.CUA2 as [Adddress 2]
,               OC.TOWN as [City]
,               OC.ECAR as [State]
,               OC.PONO as [Zip Code]
FROM			M3.OBTTRA OBT
LEFT JOIN		M3.OBTRAG OBT2 ON OBT.TAGN = OBT2.TAGN
LEFT JOIN		M3.OCUSMA OC ON OBT.CUNO = OC.CUNO
LEFT JOIN		M3.MITMAS MI ON OBT.ITNO = MI.ITNO
LEFT JOIN		M3.CSYTAB CS ON OBT.TREC = CS.STKY 
LEFT JOIN       M3.OOHEAD OH on OBT.ORNO = OH.ORNO
WHERE 			STCO = 'SMCD'
AND             OBT.CUNO NOT LIKE 'COM%'
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          DISTINCT ORNO
,               CUNM
,               CUA1
,               CUA2
,               TOWN
,               PONO
,               ECAR
,               CSCD
FROM            M3.OOADRE
WHERE           ADID <> ''
AND             ADRT = '1'
) C             on A.[Order Number] = C.[ORNO]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          DISTINCT CUNO
,               ADID as [Address ID 2]
,               CUNM as CUNM2
,               CUA1 AS CUA12
,               CUA2 AS CUA22
,               TOWN AS TOWN2
,               PONO AS PONO2
,               ECAR AS ECAR2
,               CSCD AS CSCD2
FROM            M3.OCUSAD
WHERE           ADID <> ''
AND             ADRT = '1'
) D             on A.[Customer Number] = D.[CUNO] and A.[Address ID] = D.[Address ID 2]
